title: Smart Tree Feller Enhanced
description: Fast and smart tree felling with full drops and rewards.
body:
**🌳⚡ Smart Tree Feller**

Cut down entire trees instantly with a single swing!

With Smart Tree Feller, breaking just one log will fell the entire tree — fast, satisfying, and fully configurable. Perfect for both vanilla and modded gameplay.

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

**✨ Features**

    🌳 Instant tree felling – break one log, destroy the whole tree
    🎮 Works in survival mode only (fully configurable)
    🪓 Optional axe requirement
    🌿 Supports modded trees
    📦 Drops all logs, leaves, and items
    🌱 Optional auto replanting
    ⚡ Built-in anti-lag system
    🧠 Smart detection for natural trees only
    ✨ Gain bonus XP for every tree you cut

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

**⚙️ Fully Configurable**

You can customize everything to your liking: 📁 Go to:
modpack folder → config → **smarttreefeller.json**


```
{
  "enabled": true,
  "requireAxe": true,
  "disableWhenSneaking": true,
  "survivalOnly": true,
  "naturalTreesOnly": true,
  "maxLogsPerTree": 256,
  "searchRadius": 8,
  "antiLagMode": true,
  "logsPerTick": 8,
  "autoReplant": true,
  "extraXpEnabled": true,
  "extraXpPerLog": 1,
  "extraDurabilityCost": true,
  "playStartSound": true,
  "actionBarMessage": true,
  "leafCheckRadius": 3,
  "minimumLeaves": 3
}
```

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

**⚡ Performance & Control**

    🚀 Anti-lag mode prevents performance issues
    🔢 Control how fast trees break (logsPerTick)
    🌲 Limit tree size (maxLogsPerTree)
    🎯 Fine-tune detection with leaf checks

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)    

![intelji](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f981cdb0f9bd8d718bf44ee4eb86d402e673891.png)

This mod have been created with IntelliJ

#AD
